headline: Lyft hit new holiday highs in spite of drag from winter storms: CEO
summary: Lyft (LYFT) released mixed first quarter earnings results on Thursday, the rideshare giant attributing disappointing total ride figures to the disruptive winter storms seen across the US in early 2026. Lyft CEO David Risher sits down with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi to talk about this past quarter, its rider growth, and the company's latest partnerships.

headline: Why the Smart Money Fears a Collapse in DoorDash Stock (And Why It Could Be Wrong)
summary: Although DoorDash’s recent Q1 earnings disclosure seems to have only provided a temporary blip, DASH stock could be due for a more substantive recovery.

headline: Experts react to the April jobs report
summary: Natasha Sarin, Yale Law School professor, Joe Lavorgna, SMBC Americas chief economist, and Stephanie Link, Hightower chief investment strategist and portfolio manager, join 'Squawk Box' to discuss the April jobs report, state of the economy, impact on the Fed's interest rate outlook, and more.

headline: The rise of 'income stacking': Why Gen Z is juggling multiple jobs
summary: The percentage of the workforce holding multiple jobs has been rising since 2020, reaching an all-time high last fall. “Income stacking” is popular with Gen Z.

headline: Susquehanna Maintains Positive on DoorDash, Lowers Price Target to $225
summary: Susquehanna  analyst Shyam Patil   maintains DoorDash (NASDAQ:DASH) with a Positive and lowers the price target from $250 to $225.

headline: The rise of 'income stacking': Here's what to know
summary: More Americans are working more than one job - a trend called 'income stacking'. It has become popular among Gen Z workers. Is it a sign of employers hiring more workers, or consumers under greater financial stress? CNBC's Sharon Epperson joins 'Squawk Box' with the details.
